extension.summary: Echo OnDemand — IPTV VOD + Wrestling + Fights replays
extension.description: Browse and play Movies and Series from your Xtream Codes IPTV service, plus three on-demand replay sources via debrid: Wrestling Rewind, Wrestling on Demand (WWE / AEW / TNA / NJPW / ROH / NWA / Indy / Documentaries / Archive), and Fights on Demand (UFC PPV and Fight Night, MMA, Boxing — including a Free / No Debrid sub-menu). Movies listed by genre. Series support full season and episode navigation. Results cached locally. Kodi Omega (v21) compatible. Requires script.module.resolveurl with an active debrid account.
